topic: Create and configure Azure virtual machines
key_facts: With TLaD, any new Generation 2 VMs created through any client tools defaults to Trusted Launch with secure boot and vTPM enabled.

Virtual machine total core limits

 Your subscription has default quota limits in place that could impact the deployment of many virtual machines for your project.
The current limit on a per subscription basis is 20 virtual machine total cores per region.

Option 1: Initiate a failover by using Azure Site Recovery

 You can configure Azure Site Recovery for your VMs so that you can recover your application with a single click in matter of minutes.

Option 2: Wait for recovery

 In this case, no action on your part is required.
For example, you might need to open port 22 for SSH access, but you might want to block traffic to port 80.
By default, these resources are created in the same resource group as the VM.
